attempts.code_tried: refine ModuleCat.MonoidalCategory.tensor_ext (fun s φ => ?_); erw [ModuleCat.hom_comp, ModuleCat.hom_comp, LinearMap.comp_apply, LinearMap.comp_apply, internalHomEvalApp_tmul, internalHomEvalApp_tmul]; simp only []; change M.evalLin Y ((M.dual.map f) φ) ((M.map f) s) = ((𝟙_ ...).map f).hom (M.evalLin X φ s); have key := PresheafOfModules.naturality_apply ...; rw [restr_map_homMk, restr_map_homMk] at key; have hdt := congrArg ModuleCat.Hom.hom (eq_of_heq (hom_app_heq ...)); exact (DFunLike.congr_fun hdt _).trans key
attempts.goal_before: (ModuleCat.Hom.hom ((tensorObj M M.dual).map f ≫ (restrictScalars ...).map (internalHomEvalApp Y))) (s ⊗ₜ φ) = (ModuleCat.Hom.hom (internalHomEvalApp X ≫ (𝟙_ ...).map f)) (s ⊗ₜ φ)
attempts.insight: erw [internalHomEvalApp_tmul] collapses LHS through restrictScalars/tensorObj_map_tmul by defeq. RHS reduces to evalLin form purely by defeq (internalHomEvalApp_tmul := rfl), exposed by one `change` — no unit-map rewrite needed (tensorUnit_map / unit_map_apply are unknown constants). restr_map_homMk rewrites both further-restrictions to base maps. hdt identifies the dual section's terminal value via Over.mk coherence + hom_app_heq.
